

# 📊 Maintainers

## 🧠 Core Team

| Name | Role | Responsibility |
|------|------|---------------|
| Your Name | Creator | Repo architecture, content direction |
| Contributors | Community | Improvements, fixes |

---

## 🎯 Responsibilities

Maintainers are responsible for:

- reviewing pull requests  
- maintaining structure  
- ensuring content quality  
- guiding contributors  

---

## 🔄 Workflow

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A[PR] --> B[Review]
    B --> C[Feedback]
    C --> D[Merge 🚀]
````

---

## 📩 Contact

Open an issue or discussion for communication.

---

## 🏁 Final Thought

> “Maintainers guide — contributors build.”
